actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 1633495861) in scene meta corresponds to script PhoneRingScreen (m_Script guid: 036aa4c6ab8e55144a03e8aefc6e9cca). PhoneRingScreen updates the phone screen material based on AudioSource.isPlaying: calling_material (guid: 8669b00696550574cb2f5a0480bbc344) when playing, original_material when not. To achieve full coverage, we need a way to toggle the AudioSource playback state (start/stop) via a public, parameterless method or configured m_Calls/EventTrigger. No public methods are exposed in PhoneRingScreen, and no m_Calls are present in the provided meta, so this trigger is a placeholder awaiting an event to invoke AudioSource.Play/Stop or a wrapper method.
